name.description: Unique name for the new skill. Must not collide with an existing skill name on this workbench (use workbench_skills to list names first).

description.description: Short summary of what the skill is for and when to use it.  This should be descriptive enough to guide a user to chose this skill when needed

contents.description: The full skill body text (instructions, examples, constraints) to codify whatevr knowledge you wish to preserve here
